name: Famous attractions and transportation in London
prologue: London is in chaos after Big Ben mysteriously stopped working this morning. However, this is not just a mechanical failure. According to Mycroft, it is a calculated diversion created by a criminal known as The Ghost. His real goal is to use this panic to infiltrate Westminster Abbey and steal a secret document regarding the Royal succession hidden under the Coronation Chair. With the police unable to solve the case, you have been recruited to help Sherlock and Watson. You must race across the city to intercept the thief and recover the document before it is too late.

npcs.name: Dr. John Watson
npcs.persona: A loyal and practical British army doctor who assists by reporting on physical evidence found at the scene and information gathered from witnesses with a helpful, urgent demeanor.
npcs.display_description: Watson is a loyal British army doctor and Sherlock's trusted companion. He can provide information about physical evidence and witness testimonies.
npcs.background: Served in Afghanistan as an army doctor. Now assists Sherlock Holmes in solving mysteries around London.

npcs.name: Mycroft Holmes
npcs.persona: A condescending British official who is the embodiment of the Government, responsible for authorizing codes and unlocking official data with an air of weary superiority.
npcs.display_description: Mycroft is Sherlock's older brother and a senior British government official. He has access to classified information and security codes.
npcs.background: The most powerful man in British government. His word can open any door in the realm.

npcs.name: Sherlock Holmes
npcs.persona: A arrogant and hyper-observant British consulting detective who provides answers about precise visual details and calculations while frequently insulting the user's lack of intellect.
npcs.display_description: The world's only consulting detective. He notices every detail and can deduce facts that others miss. Ask him about visual clues and deductions.
npcs.background: 221B Baker Street's famous detective. His methods of deduction are legendary.

levels.title: The Frozen Big Ben
levels.description: You arrive at Big Ben to find the clock broken and the surrounding area sealed off by the police. To open the electronic lock, you must input two critical pieces of information. Three experts are present at the scene: the detective Sherlock, the government official Mycroft, and Dr. Watson. Please consult them for clues to complete the following tasks.

levels.title: Westminster Bridge
levels.description: After successfully restarting Big Ben, you followed the suspect's tracks to a bus stop. There, you found a Ghost Bus, a red double-decker that isn't on any official schedule.The doors are locked, and the electronic sign shows only strange symbols. The driver, who seems to be an AI or a very stubborn old man, refuses to let you in. He says you must prove you are qualified to learn the Ancient Secrets before he opens the door.

questions.reference_answer:

levels.title: The Silent Rosetta
levels.description: After arriving at the museum, you find the alarms ringing loudly, but the main doors are locked. Following the clues on Dr. Watson’s card (H. Carter), you enter the Egyptian Gallery through a secret passage.The suspect is trying to steal a fragment of the Rosetta Stone, which contains the coordinates to the final treasure. The stone is currently locked inside a high-tech shield. To unlock it and get the coordinates, you must identify anomalies in the exhibit and provide the correct catalog numbers.

levels.title: The Knowledge Challenge
levels.description: After solving the mystery of the Rosetta Stone, you learn that the suspect is heading to Westminster Abbey. However, it is now rush hour in London, and the only way to get there fast is by taking a legendary Black Cab. The driver is a veteran who has mastered The Knowledge (a famous, difficult test for London cabbies). He refuses to drive tourists who don't know the local rules. He locks the doors and tells you that you must answer three insider questions about London's streets and fares before he will let you in.

levels.title: The Secret of the Coronation
levels.description: You reached Westminster Abbey just before the royal ceremony began. The suspect is after a stolen document hidden under St. Edward's Chair (the Coronation Chair). Since staff are making final preparations, you must remain quiet. To get the document back, you need to find its exact location and answer the guard's questions.
